'''yakuku''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mktg|mktg]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-k-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mktg|mktg]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yakuku
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yækikith|yækikith]] || [[word:yækikij|yækikij]] || [[word:yækikish|yækikish]] || [[word:yækiki|yækiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yakukukuth|yakukukuth]] || [[word:yakukukuj|yakukukuj]] || [[word:yakukukush|yakukukush]] || [[word:yakukuku|yakukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yakukuth|yakukuth]] || [[word:yakukuj|yakukuj]] || [[word:yakukush|yakukush]] || [[word:yakuku|yakuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yakufkuth|yakufkuth]] || [[word:yakufkuj|yakufkuj]] || [[word:yakufkush|yakufkush]] || [[word:yakufkuf|yakufkuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yakukuthu|yakukuthu]] || [[word:yakukuju|yakukuju]] || [[word:yakukushu|yakukushu]] || [[word:yakukuku|yakukuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yakukuth|yakukuth]] || [[word:yakukuj|yakukuj]] || [[word:yakukush|yakukush]] || [[word:yakuku|yakuku]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yakukuthul|yakukuthul]] || [[word:yakukujul|yakukujul]] || [[word:yakukushul|yakukushul]] || [[word:yakukukul|yakukukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yakukuthuthu|yakukuthuthu]] || [[word:yakukujuju|yakukujuju]] || [[word:yakukushushu|yakukushushu]] || [[word:yakukuku|yakukuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yakukuthun|yakukuthun]] || [[word:yakukujun|yakukujun]] || [[word:yakukushun|yakukushun]] || [[word:yakukukun|yakukukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yakukuthuoro|yakukuthuoro]] || [[word:yakukujuoro|yakukujuoro]] || [[word:yakukushuoro|yakukushuoro]] || [[word:yakukukuoro|yakukukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
